title: harrisia portoricensis
intro: Harrisia portoricensis, also known as the Puerto Rican pitaya or dragon fruit cactus, is a species of cactus that belongs to the genus Harrisia, characterized by its bright green stems and vibrant yellow flowers. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Harrisia portoricensis include reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and exhibiting antioxidant properties. Harrisia portoricensis is often used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal and health benefits.
